# Copilot workspace instructions

For completed tasks in this workspace:

- Before the final reply, announce completion with the local speech helper.
- Run a short spoken summary from the repo root using the existing helper.
- Keep the phrase very short, about 2 to 6 words.
- Prefer summaries such as:
  - README updated
  - Spotify fix done
  - Chrome helper updated
  - Setup script finished
- Only announce once per completed request.
